title: Fixed Length of Occurrence
text: Fixed Length of Occurrence Number of characters allocated to each occurrence of the entity. Description There is no default value. However, if the entity contains only fixed-length fields, the fixed length of the occurrence is the sum of the lengths of the fields. You should define the fixed length of the occurrence when: The total length of an occurrence must be greater than the sum of the lengths of the fields. The entity contains variable-length fields and you want to limit the length of each occurrence. Applies to Modeled Entity Interface Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
